summary: Phases 24/25/26 end-to-end tested. Backend: 21/21 pytest tests PASS in /app/backend/tests/test_phase24_25_26.py (auth-cookie migration, predictive-forecast 3/6/9/12 horizons + structure, partner-intelligence RBAC, partner-commission-analytics RBAC for admin/ops/finance + customer 403, AI coaching admin-only, AI regression for /ai/command + /leads/{id}/ai/risk-analysis + follow-up). Frontend: cookie-based login + refresh-persistence + new nav links + Predictive Forecast page (KPI cards, chart, breakdown table, horizon switcher) + Partner Intelligence page (leaderboard + AI Coach dialog with real Gemini coaching content) all verified visually + functionally. Auth cookie set with HttpOnly=true, Secure=true, SameSite=Lax — confirmed via browser context.cookies(). localStorage contains NO token (only posthog + meshora-theme). Page refresh on /dashboard keeps user logged in (cookie auth works end-to-end). Bearer-token path still works (test_me_works_with_bearer_only PASS). One frontend issue: the visible Logout control couldn't be located via standard selectors (button:has-text('Logout'), data-testid=logout-btn, etc.) — likely tucked inside a user-avatar dropdown that wasn't opened by the test; backend POST /api/auth/logout works correctly (test_logout_clears_cookie_and_blocks_me PASS) and clears the cookie. Hydration warnings (same family as iteration_12) appear on the new /predictive-forecast page table (<span> wrapper from Emergent visual-edit instrumentation injected between <tbody> and <tr>).

ui_bugs.issue: Same React hydration warning class as iteration_12: '<span> cannot be a child of <tbody>' and '<tr> cannot be a child of <span>'. The x-ve-dynamic instrumentation wraps the forecast rows in <span style={{display:'contents'}}>. Rendering still works but pollutes console.
ui_bugs.selector: tbody > span > tr inside Predictive Forecast breakdown table

ui_bugs.issue: Console warnings: 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' on Predictive Forecast + Partner Intelligence pages. Chart still renders after layout settles but the warning fires on every render cycle.

integration_issues.issue: Could not locate a visible Logout button on /dashboard via standard selectors ([data-testid=logout-btn], [data-testid=sidebar-logout], button:has-text('Logout'), a:has-text('Logout')). Backend logout API works (cookie cleared, /me returns 401 after). The control likely lives inside the user-avatar dropdown in the top-right ("Super Admin" pill). Recommend adding data-testid="logout-btn" or data-testid="user-menu-trigger" + data-testid="logout-btn" to make the flow testable.

action_items: (MEDIUM) Frontend: add data-testid='logout-btn' to the Logout button (likely in the user-avatar dropdown / topbar) so e2e tests can exercise the cookie-clear path through the UI.

(MEDIUM, carry-over) Fix React hydration warnings on table rows — same pattern as CommercialDetail.jsx milestone table in iteration_12, now also on PredictiveForecast.jsx breakdown table. Wrap dynamic <tr> rows with React.Fragment instead of implicit <span>.
(LOW) Suppress or fix Recharts 'width(-1)/height(-1)' warnings on initial mount in PredictiveForecast + PartnerIntelligence by guaranteeing the container has a minHeight/aspect before mount.
critical_code_review_comments: Phase 26 auth migration is correctly backward compatible: get_current_user reads cookie FIRST then falls back to Bearer (server.py:549-551). Both paths verified by separate pytest tests.
Cookie attributes match spec exactly: HttpOnly=True, Secure=True, SameSite=lax, path=/, max_age=JWT_EXPIRATION_HOURS*3600. Browser confirms httpOnly + secure + lax on the preview HTTPS domain.
Frontend has no token in localStorage after login — only posthog + theme keys. AuthContext correctly relies on /auth/me with credentials:include on mount.
Predictive forecast endpoint validates horizon_months and returns exact-length forecast array for 3/6/9/12. summary.trend_direction is one of up/down/flat. AI narrative returned in <60s.
Partner-commission-analytics RBAC matches spec: super_admin / vyapaar_ops / vyapaar_finance allowed; customer 403; finance role correctly bypasses the read-only block on this GET.
Partner-intelligence existing RBAC: super_admin + vyapaar_ops + selling_partner allowed; customer 403. Spec said selling_partner should access — verified.

AI coaching endpoint is admin/ops only (verified by customer 403). Real Gemini call completes within timeout and returns full schema (partner, stats, summary, strengths, weaknesses, coaching_tips, leads_to_focus, next_training_topic, confidence).
Existing AI endpoints (/ai/command, /leads/{id}/ai/risk-analysis, /leads/{id}/ai/follow-up-suggestion) still accept Bearer tokens — Phase 26 did not break the regression path.
Logout endpoint correctly returns 200 unconditionally (no auth required) — frontend can call it on any 'logout' click without a valid session, as documented in the code comment.

success_rate.frontend: 90% (login, cookie set, refresh-persistence, sidebar nav, /predictive-forecast page render, horizon switcher, /partner-intelligence page render, AI Coach dialog — all verified. Logout-via-UI not exercised due to missing testid on the logout button.)

test_credentials: Used: admin@vyapaarnetwork.com/admin123, john@testco.com/test123, ops_test@meshora.com/ops123456, fin_test@meshora.com/fin123456. All four work. No new credentials created.
seed_data_creation: None. Tests use existing data (selling_partner users, leads).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 24/25/26 tests live at /app/backend/tests/test_phase24_25_26.py — 21 tests, ~92s including 2-3 Gemini calls. Run with: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_phase24_25_26.py -v --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/phase24_25_26_results.xml. Note: BASE_URL is loaded from /app/frontend/.env REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL (env var fallback) since pytest does not auto-load that file. Auth cookie 'access_token' is set with HttpOnly+Secure+SameSite=Lax on the preview HTTPS domain. Frontend uses ONLY cookies — no localStorage token. To test logout via UI in the future, first add data-testid='logout-btn' to the Logout control in the topbar/user-menu (currently unreachable by standard selectors).
rca of the issue: N/A — no functional bugs. The two outstanding cosmetic items (hydration warnings on table rows + Recharts width(-1) warning) are environment-side: hydration warning is from Emergent's visual-edit dynamic-instrumentation <span> wrapper around mapped <tr> rows; Recharts warnings fire during the first paint when the container width has not yet been measured by the layout engine. Both are non-blocking. The only test-side miss (UI logout) is a missing data-testid, not a functional defect — the backend logout flow + cookie clear are verified in pytest.
